teams.name: Red Falcon Racing
teams.contract: Red Falcon Racing welcomes you. As our rookie driver, your mission is simple: bring glory to the Falcon.

teams.name: Silver Arrow GP
teams.contract: Silver Arrow GP offers you a professional contract. Deliver consistent podiums and we’ll extend your deal.

teams.name: Blue Charge Racing
teams.contract: Blue Charge Racing demands excellence. If you can handle the pressure, sign below.

teams.name: Papaya Speedworks
teams.contract: Papaya Speedworks is known for innovation. We want a driver who can match our energy.

teams.name: Alpine Storm
teams.contract: Alpine Storm offers you a chance to prove yourself. Show us your control in the corners.

teams.name: Banana Power Racing
teams.contract: Banana Power Racing is… well… bananas. Slip into our team and peel out on track.

teams.name: MemeSpeed Motorsports
teams.contract: MemeSpeed Motorsports wants you. Yes, YOU. Don’t ask why. Just sign.

teams.name: Chaos GP
teams.contract: Chaos GP thrives on unpredictability. If you like danger, welcome aboard.
